summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of ComplianceShield dashboard app. All 4 pages (Landing, Dashboard, Reports, Pricing) tested successfully with full functionality verified. Backend health check API working. All navigation, theme toggle, interactive components, and mock data displays working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend health check API (200 status)
Landing page hero section with correct title and subtitle
Landing page How it works section with 3 step cards
Landing page setup command section displaying correct command
CTA buttons navigation (Get Started Free -> Dashboard, View Pricing -> Pricing)
Theme toggle functionality (light/dark mode switching)
Navigation between all 4 pages (Home, Dashboard, Reports, Pricing)
Dashboard dark theme implementation
Dashboard jurisdiction toggles for GDPR, DPDP India, HIPAA, SOC2
Dashboard scan results table with 9 scan entries
Dashboard detail panel with severity badges, jurisdiction tags, violation/fixed code
Dashboard Accept Fix button functionality (changes to 'Fix Accepted')
Dashboard dependency panel with SafeDep results showing Safe/Blocked badges
Reports page search functionality filtering reports correctly
Reports page Export PDF buttons with loading states
Reports page Generate Security Whitepaper button
Reports table with all expected columns and 7 compliance reports
Pricing page 3 tiers: Free ($0), Pro ($99) with Popular badge, Enterprise ($5,000/year)
Pricing page CTA buttons showing appropriate alerts
All navigation links working correctly
Logo navigation returning to home page
